channel.title: Strongswan on CodebyRed | Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Strongswan on CodebyRed | Blog

item.title: Secure Site Access via Strongswan Ikev2 Roadwarrior Vpn
item.description: Objective Roadwarrior client connects to VPN gateway over 10.10.80.0/24 Access protected LAN 10.10.30.0/24 Client gets virtual IP from 192.168.98.0/24 Network Topology [ Roadwarrior Client ] | | 10.10.80.0/24 | [ VPN Server (StrongSwan) ] - ens19: 10.10.80.200 - ens18: 10.10.30.51 | | 10.10.30.0/24 | [ MikroTik Router ] - Gateway: 10.10.30.1 Server Configuration (/etc/swanctl/swanctl.conf) connections { rw { version = 2 local_addrs = 10.10.80.200 local { auth = psk id = 10.
